# Generated by tools/m8_knowledge.py --write; M8 disables vanilla advancement gameplay.
# Keys and their dependent trigger references remain valid for loaded vanilla script.
eastern_african_trade = {
	age = age_1_traditions
	icon = trade_caravans

	potential = {
		always = no # M8 disables vanilla advancement
		original_capital ?= {
			sub_continent = sub_continent:east_africa
		}
	}

	requires = slave_raiding_wars
	trade_sea_efficiency = medium_trade_sea_efficiency_bonus
	allow_tributary_subject = yes
}
